summary: Completed comprehensive testing of mobile landing page updates including Free Report button, FreeReportForm modal, mobile sticky CTA, and BusinessForm integration. All 11 requested features tested successfully with full backend API integration verified.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/free-leads POST creates free lead successfully (200 status)
Backend API /api/leads POST creates business lead successfully
Backend API /api/payments/create-session works with demo mode
Backend API /api/payments/confirm processes payment confirmation
Backend API /api/track analytics endpoint functional
Header button shows 'Free Report' text with gift icon
Header button is compact/smaller on mobile (text-xs, py-2 px-4 classes)
Clicking 'Free Report' opens FreeReportForm modal correctly
FreeReportForm has exactly 3 fields: business name, email, location
FreeReportForm shows 'Your free snapshot includes' section with benefits list
FreeReportForm submit button says 'Send My Free Snapshot'
Mobile sticky CTA shows 'Get Full Report – $199' text
Mobile sticky CTA is visible on mobile viewport (390x844)
Mobile sticky CTA is hidden on desktop viewport (1920x1080)
Clicking mobile sticky CTA opens full BusinessForm modal
BusinessForm has all 7 required fields (business_name, website, location, business_type, owner_name, email, phone)
Business type field is a dropdown with multiple options
Both FreeReportForm and BusinessForm can be closed with X button
Free report form submission works end-to-end (form → /api/free-leads → success modal)
Success modal shows 'Check Your Email!' with correct email address
Business form integration works (form → lead creation → payment session → redirect)
Analytics tracking events fire correctly for both form types
Form validation and error handling work properly
